name: 05_metrics_single_contract_transport_dev_transport_tsrc_uvw_asset_perf_maint_kpi25_1
statement:
SELECT
  'contract' AS table_family,
  'transport_dev' AS catalog_name,
  'transport_tsrc' AS schema_name,
  'uvw_asset_perf_maint_kpi25_1' AS table_name,
  'VIEW' AS table_type,
  COUNT(*) AS row_count,
  COUNT(*) > 0 AS has_rows,
  GREATEST(MAX(try_cast(`constructiondate` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`disposaldate` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`EarliestStartDate` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`DueDate` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`scheduleddate` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`CompletedInspId` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`Completeddate` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`NonCompliantDate` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`ScheduledStatus` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`AssessmentDate` AS TIMESTAMP))) AS latest_observed_ts,
  LEAST(MIN(try_cast(`constructiondate` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`disposaldate` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`EarliestStartDate` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`DueDate` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`scheduleddate` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`CompletedInspId` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`Completeddate` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`NonCompliantDate` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`ScheduledStatus` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`AssessmentDate` AS TIMESTAMP))) AS earliest_observed_ts,
  'constructiondate|disposaldate|EarliestStartDate|DueDate|scheduleddate|CompletedInspId|Completeddate|NonCompliantDate|ScheduledStatus|AssessmentDate' AS freshness_columns
FROM `transport_dev`.`transport_tsrc`.`uvw_asset_perf_maint_kpi25_1`

error.message: [UNRESOLVED_COLUMN.WITH_SUGGESTION] A column, variable, or function parameter with name `a`.`ElectricalAssetType` cannot be resolved. Did you mean one of the following? [`i`.`Asset Type`, `a`.`assettype`, `a`.`spatialtype`, `a`.`AssetSubType`, `a`.`assetname`]. SQLSTATE: 42703; line 240 pos 20
